texto: It occurred to me that grief is like a tunnel. You enter it without a choice because you must get to the other side. The darkness of it plays tricks on you and sometimes you can even forget where you are or what your purpose is. I believe that people, now and again, get lost or stuck in that tunnel and never find their way out.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Loretta Nyhan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “It occurred to me that grief is like a tunnel. You enter it without a choice because you must get…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, depression, grief pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e reflexao-noturna.
